arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah opens up on private talk with ex-Arsenal manager and advice he received
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has scored 30 goals and registered 21 assists for Liverpool so far this season, and the Egyptian star has now revealed the advice he received from an unlikely source

arts.ttl: Arne Slot touchline ban: What can Liverpool boss do, and where?
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot has been given a two-match touchline ban, but what does it mean and how involved will he be?

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Newcastle United: Arne Slot learns Merseyside derby punishments, will Dutchman be in dugout for Premier League clash?
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot discovers whether he will be able to take his place in the dugout against Newcastle United having learned his punishment for his part in the post-match scenes after the Merseyside derby.

arts.ttl: Chris Wood looking to build on 'unusual stat' after outperforming Erling Haaland and Mo Salah
arts.sum: Only three players have scored more goals than Chris Wood in the Premier League this season, with the Nottingham Forest star aiming to fire his team into the Champions League

arts.ttl: Arne Slot signing could still miss out on Liverpool Premier League winner's medal
arts.sum: A Liverpool summer signing is still running the risk of missing out on a Premier League winners' medal if, as expected, Arne Slot's side go on to clinch the title this season

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Newcastle United: Will Arne Slot rotate his midfield to maintain lead in Premier League title race?
arts.sum: Liverpool are set to take on Newcastle United at Anfield in the Premier League on Wednesday, but there is an argument that Dominik Szoboszlai is in need of a rest.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Slot hails Nunez reaction after work-rate criticism
arts.sum: Arne Slot has hailed the reaction of Darwin Nunez following his criticism of the player’s effort during Liverpool’s draw at Aston Villa. Slot was critical of Nunez following his reaction to a missed chance during the clash at Villa Park earlier this month. arts.ttl: 'For sure': Liverpool are definitely interested in signing £45m player who's already been spotted at Anfield - Romano
arts.sum: The 18-year-old confirmed he was at Anfield to watch Liverpool vs Ipswich in January 👀

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher explains why Liverpool haven’t finalised trio of contract renewals – Reveals who he ‘would love’ to coach Reds
arts.sum: Liverpool are yet to sign Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk or Trent Alexander-Arnold to new contracts as they don’t see the value of doing so for the next two to five years. That’s according to Jamie Carragher, who has discussed the situation with SportBILD today as it continues to rumble on. arts.ttl: What Arne Slot can and cannot do after being hit with touchline ban for Newcastle clash
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot will be serving a touchline ban at Anfield against Newcastle United on Wednesday evening after the FA announced his punishment for being sent off vs Everton
